user.title: Minecraft Broker
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your Minecraft control broker. The broker URL ends in /api/control. The bearer token and HMAC key are the two secrets configured on the broker; Azure credentials are never stored here.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the bearer token and HMAC key.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the broker. Check the URL and that the Function is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to the broker.

abort.already_configured: This broker URL is already configured.

start_server.name: Start server
start_server.description: Start the VM (and optionally an instance), then report status.

stop_server.name: Stop server
stop_server.description: Gracefully stop instances, take a fresh backup, then deallocate the VM.

service_start.name: Start instance
service_start.description: Start a named Minecraft instance (VM must be running).

service_stop.name: Stop instance
service_stop.description: Stop a named Minecraft instance (VM must be running).

service_restart.name: Restart instance
service_restart.description: Restart a named Minecraft instance (VM must be running).

refresh.name: Refresh status
refresh.description: Poll the broker for the latest VM and instance status.
